summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Glimmer Quest Match-3 puzzle game. All features working correctly. The original bug (gems grouping 4+ without disappearing after cascades) has been FIXED. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (20/20 tests). Frontend game mechanics, modals, and interactions all working properly.
passed_tests: Backend: All 20 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: Player creation and retrieval
Backend: Game start/end flow with lives management
Backend: Shop purchases and coin deduction
Backend: Power-up usage and inventory management
Backend: Daily rewards claim and streak tracking
Backend: Leaderboard retrieval
Backend: Ad rewards (coins and lives)
Backend: IAP packages listing
Frontend: Player name input and creation
Frontend: Main menu with all buttons (Play, Shop, Daily, Awards, Ranks)
Frontend: 8x8 game board renders correctly (64 gem cells)
Frontend: Gem selection visual feedback (ring highlight)
Frontend: Gem swapping mechanics working
Frontend: Match detection - 3+ gems in horizontal/vertical lines clear automatically
Frontend: Cascading - new gems fall and create new matches automatically
Frontend: NO UNCLEARED MATCHES after cascades (original bug FIXED)
Frontend: Score increases after matches
Frontend: Move counter decrements after valid swap
Frontend: Combo system working (2x COMBO displayed)
Frontend: Shop modal opens/closes without blocking game board
Frontend: Daily rewards modal opens/closes without blocking game board
Frontend: Power-ups bar displays correctly
Frontend: HUD elements (lives, coins, score, moves, target) all present
seed_data_creation: Test players created dynamically with unique names (TestPlayer_*, CascadeTest, ModalTest, FinalTest)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core game mechanics verified working. The original bug report about gems grouping (4+) without disappearing after cascades has been FIXED. The processMatches() function now includes a safety check loop (lines 1219-1267 in App.js) that ensures all matches are cleared before the board stabilizes. Modal overlay issues from previous iterations have also been resolved - modals now open/close correctly without blocking game interactions.

rca_of_the_issue.original_bug: Gems grouping together (4+) without disappearing after cascades
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The processMatches function was not fully processing all cascading matches, leaving some 3+ gem groups uncleared
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added safety check loop (lines 1219-1267) that continues processing matches until the board is truly stable, with up to 3 additional passes to catch any edge cases
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested 25+ swaps across multiple game sessions - no uncleared matches found after any cascade
